name: Spinach Salad with Bacon and Apple
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash spinach thoroughly. Remove stems, and discard discolored leaves. Dry and crisp in refrigerator.
2. Fry bacon until crisp. Remove slices to drain, pour off grease and place almonds in pan. Stir over medium heat until toasted. Drain on paper towels.
3. To prepare dressing, combine almond oil, vinegar, sugar, salt, pepper, and mustard. Whisk until blended and set aside.
4. Tear spinach into large pieces, and place in a large salad bowl with scallions, apples, and almonds. Crumble bacon and add. Just before serving, rewhisk dressing, pour over salad, and toss.
